{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/222762364?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/jufeng123768", "id": 222762364, "login": "jufeng123768", "node_id": "U_kgDODUcVfA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/jufeng123768", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41383", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Summary

Before OpenClaw 2026.4.2, the OpenShell mirror backend accepted arbitrary absolute `remoteWorkspaceDir` and `remoteAgentWorkspaceDir` values. In mirror mode, those paths were then used as the target of remote cleanup and overwrite operations.

## Impact

If an attacker could influence those OpenShell config values, mirror sync could delete the contents of an unintended remote directory and replace them with uploaded workspace data. This was a destructive remote-path bug in the mirror-sync path.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.4.1`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.2`
- Latest published npm version: `2026.4.1`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `b21c9840c2e38f4bb338d031511b479d5f07ca25` — constrain OpenShell mirror sync roots

## Release Process Note

The fix is present on `main` and is staged for OpenClaw `2026.4.2`. Publish this advisory after the `2026.4.2` npm release is live.

Thanks @jufeng123768 for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00371, "percentile": 0.28743}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m34q-h93w-vg5x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:14:57Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m34q-h93w-vg5x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m34q-h93w-vg5x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41383"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:14:57Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-m34q-h93w-vg5x", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/b21c9840c2e38f4bb338d031511b479d5f07ca25", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m34q-h93w-vg5x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-m34q-h93w-vg5x", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: OpenShell mirror mode could delete arbitrary remote directories when roots were mis-scoped", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:17:19Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m34q-h93w-vg5x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenClaw: OpenShell mirror mode could delete arbitrary remote directories when roots were mis-scoped
